title: Sleep during pregnancy
excerpt: Why sleep is disrupted and practical habits for comfort — when snoring or insomnia needs medical review.
content:
## Why sleep is harder

Hormones, frequent urination, heartburn, back pain, and anxiety all play a role.

## Suggestions

- Side sleeping with pillow between knees (left side often recommended late pregnancy).
- Light evening snack if nausea allows; avoid large meals before bed.
- Limit screens before sleep; cool, dark room.
- Short daytime naps if night sleep is fragmented.

## Ask your clinician about

Loud snoring with gasping (sleep apnea), restless legs, or depression affecting sleep.
